role_desc_king_of_lions: As the Apex leader, your goal is to devour the herd. You choose a victim to kill each night.
role_desc_alpha_lion: You can infect a player each night to convert them into a lion, growing your pride.
role_desc_apex_vulture: You can investigate players at night to find out their roles and inform your pride.
role_desc_wise_owl: Every night, you investigate one animal to determine their true allegiance.
role_desc_fledgling_owl: You can compare two animals at night to see if they belong to the same faction.
role_desc_rabbit_witch: You possess two potions: one to heal an attacked player, and one to poison a player of your choosing.
role_desc_rhino_hunter: If you are killed, you take your attacker down with you.
role_desc_common_sheep: You have no special abilities, but your vote during the day is crucial to surviving.
role_desc_playing_possum: Your sole objective is to trick the herd into lynching you during the day.
role_desc_hypnotic_serpent: You can dominate players at night. Once dominated, they become your servants and you can force them to kill for you.
role_desc_venomous_snake: You can poison a player. They will die in two nights if not cured.
role_desc_ghostly_dog: Even after death, you can protect one player from attacks.
role_desc_crazy_chemist_toad: You gamble with potions at night. You might poison your target, or accidentally poison yourself!
role_desc_cursed_sheep: If attacked by lions, you won't die, but will turn into a lion instead.
role_desc_disguised_lion: You appear as a normal sheep to investigators, but you kill for the Apex pride.
night_no_action: 🌙 The night is quiet. Rest well.

role_desc_sneaky_raccoon: At night, steal another player's role and make it your own. If Full Thief mode is OFF, they become a Common Sheep. If ON, you get a 50% chance each night, and they become the new Thief!

about_text_2: Created with ❤️ by the open source community.
role_desc_chunky_mongoose: You are completely immune to the Hypnotic Serpent's domination. If they target you, you will bite their head off!
role_desc_quilled_porcupine: You have 2 bullets. During the Day discussion, you can choose to shoot and instantly kill any player in broad daylight. Use your bullets wisely!
engine_night_gunner_retaliate: 💥 In the dead of night, the Apex lunged at {0}... but they were waiting. {0} fired their weapon in self-defense, striking {1} dead!
engine_draw_solo_death: 💀 Left with no purpose, {0} faded away...
role_desc_roaring_hippopotamus: You start hidden like a normal player. At any time during the day phase, you can reveal yourself. Once revealed, your vote counts as two lynch votes!
mayor_reveal_prompt: 🎖 **Day Phase:** You are the Roaring Hippopotamus (Mayor). You can reveal yourself now to make your vote count double for the rest of the game.
mayor_reveal_success: ✅ You have permanently revealed yourself! Your vote now counts double.
mayor_reveal_announce: 📢 **The Roaring Hippopotamus** {0} has revealed themselves! Their vote now counts double.
role_desc_peaceful_manatee: Once per game, during the day phase, you can cancel the lynch entirely. No one will be voted out that day. Using this ability will publicly reveal your identity to everyone.
pacifist_prompt: ☮️ **Day Phase:** You are the Peaceful Manatee (Pacifist). You can use your power to cancel today's lynch. This can only be used once per game, and it will reveal your identity.
pacifist_success: ✅ You have cancelled today's lynch! Your identity has been revealed.
pacifist_announce: ☮️ **{0}** steps forward and delivers a heartfelt speech about peace and harmony. The village is so moved that they have decided not to lynch anyone today. {0} is revealed as the **Peaceful Manatee**!
pacifist_no_lynch: ☮️ The Peaceful Manatee's plea has been heard. No one will be lynched today.

role_desc_lone_jaguar: You are a solitary killer. Each night, you must choose a victim to eliminate. You win if you are the last player standing. Apex cannot kill you; instead, you will kill them if they try. You cannot be converted.
engine_night_sk_reverse_kill: 🐆 Someone tried to attack the Lone Jaguar... but the Jaguar was waiting, and killed them instead!
engine_night_sk_kill: 🐆 The Lone Jaguar has claimed another victim tonight.
engine_night_chemist_gamble_sk: 🧪 A Chemist tried to force the Lone Jaguar to drink a potion, but was stabbed before they could even finish their sentence!
engine_sk_overpower: 🐆 Only {0} (Lone Jaguar) and {1} remain... The Lone Jaguar easily overpowers their final victim and claims ultimate victory!
engine_draw_sk_hunter: 💥 Only {0} (Lone Jaguar) and {1} (Hunter) remain... They lunge at each other in a final, bloody clash, leaving no survivors. It's a draw!
ability_type_serialkillerkill: Assassinate (Kill a target each night, solo win)
role_desc_two_faced_jackal:
Two-Faced Jackal 🖕

Starts as a normal member of The Herd. You win with them... unless all Apex are eliminated. If the last Apex dies, your true allegiance awakens! You will transform into a King of Lions and join the predators to avenge them.

Strategy: Hide in plain sight. Protect the Apex secretly while keeping your cover intact.
engine_traitor_transforms: 🦁 The last Apex has fallen, but the nightmare isn't over! {0} has revealed their true nature and transformed into a King of Lions!
🦁 As the village celebrates the death of the predators, {0} begins to laugh... They were a Two-Faced Jackal all along, and the transformation has begun!
🦁 The blood of the fallen Apex awakens something dark in {0}... They have transformed into a King of Lions to take revenge!
dm_traitor_transforms: 🦁 The last Apex has fallen... Your true allegiance awakens! The beast within takes over. You are now a King of Lions! Avenge your fallen brethren and slaughter the Herd!
dm_traitor_intro: You are the Two-Faced Jackal. Pretend to be a Villager and vote with them. However, if all Apex members are eliminated, you will instantly transform into one of them. Do what you must to ensure the predators win!
role_desc_matchmaking_dove:
You are the Matchmaking Dove! 🕊️

On Night 1, you choose two players to become Lovers. Their fates will be intertwined forever. If one dies, the other will die of grief immediately!

The Lovers win ONLY if they are the last two players alive at the end of the game, betraying their original factions for forbidden love. Choose wisely, you may even pick yourself!
dm_dove_intro: You are the Matchmaking Dove. Tonight, you must choose two players to bind their hearts together. Be careful who you pick, their fates are now linked!
dm_dove_lover_notify: 💕 You are now in love with {0}! Your fates are intertwined. If they die, you will die of a broken heart. You and your lover win the game if you are the last two surviving players, betraying your original factions!
engine_dove_linked: 🕊️ You have successfully linked {0} and {1}. Their fates are now bound by love!
engine_dove_linked_public: 🕊️ Somewhere in the dark, two hearts were bound together by a forbidden love...
engine_lover_died: 💔 {0} could not bear the grief of losing their true love, and died of a broken heart!
dm_lover_died: 💔 Your lover has died! The pain is too much to bear... You fade away from a broken heart.
engine_lovers_win: 💕 Against all odds, {0} and {1} survived! Their forbidden love has conquered the savanna! The Lovers win!
ability_type_linklovers: Link Lovers (Bond two players with a shared fate)
role_desc_blindfolded_kangaroo: Once per game, during the day phase, you can activate your ability to blindfold a random Apex member. Their night action targets will be encrypted!
kangaroo_prompt: 🦘 **Day Phase:** You are the Blindfolded Kangaroo. Do you want to activate your ability today to blindfold a random Apex member?
kangaroo_activated: ✅ You have activated your ability! A random Apex member has been blindfolded.
kangaroo_error: You cannot use this ability right now or you have already used it.
kangaroo_no_apex: You tried to blindfold an Apex, but there are no eligible Apex members alive!
kangaroo_announce: 🦘 **{0}** reveals themselves as the **Blindfolded Kangaroo** and kicks dust in the air, blinding a random Apex predator!
night_choose_retaliate: Choose who you'll retaliate against if attacked:
night_choose_steal: 🦝 Choose a player to steal their role from:
dove_choose_first_lover: 🕊️ **Choose the first lover** (you may pick yourself):
dove_choose_second_lover:
✅ First lover: **{0}**
Now choose the second lover to bind them:
fledgling_first_target:
✅ First target: **{0}**
Now choose the second player to compare:
witch_heal_potion_prompt: Choose a target for your 💚 **Heal Potion**:
witch_kill_potion_prompt: Choose a target for your 💀 **Kill Potion**:
gunner_shoot_day_only: Shooting is only allowed during the Day phase discussion.
gunner_save_bullet_edit: You chose to save your bullet for later.
gunner_shot_edit: You shot {0}! You have {1} bullet(s) left.
gunner_announce: 💥 **BANG!** {0} the Quilled Porcupine just shot {1} in broad daylight!
dm_killed_serpent_cascade: died, causing you to perish as well!
dm_killed_serpent_investigate: hypnotized you to death when you investigated them!
dm_killed_poison_action: finally took its toll and killed you!
dm_killed_retaliate_action: retaliated against you for attacking them!
dm_killed_jk_reverse: ambushed you when you tried to attack them!
dm_killed_jk_reverse_infect: ambushed you when you tried to infect them!
dm_killed_threw_potion: threw a deadly potion at you!
help_group_prompt: Click the button below to view the help guide in your preferred language.
start_helper_welcome: Welcome to Wereanimals! Please choose an option below to get started:
start_helper_help_text: Wereanimals is a social deduction game. Read the manual below to learn how to play.
